runners.formComment: Returns from a break and was a winner at only other try fresh, which was at first career start scoring at Warragul over 400m. Looks a definite winning chance here.

runners.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Warrnambool over 390m in 22.11 last start, beating Bragging Rights. Makes plenty of appeal. Go close again.

runners.formComment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a fast early split, paving the way for a 1.5 lengths win at Sale over 435m in 24.43. Rates among the chances this time.

runners.formComment: Finished seventh last start at this track but prior to that had been racing consistently. Boxed awkwardly and will need to find best.

runners.formComment: Form has been strong with wins two and three starts back. Last time out finished 3rd over 410m at Horsham beaten 3.5 lengths (23.45) behind Waxing in a Grade 5 on April 7. Thereabouts recently and definitely worth including.

runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Geelong (23.44) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 13 length fifth. Super consistent from the draw with a win and three places from four starts. Will need the right run.

runners.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Geelong to win by 3.5 lengths in 25.96, beating Gravy Train. Last start finished 6th over 460m at Geelong beaten 10 lengths (26.58) behind Paw Fable in a Mix 6/7 FIN on March 20. Well placed and among the chances here.
